title: MagicWands
body:
# MagicWands

Add magic to your server!

## Features
- Customizable magic wands
- Semi-customizable spells

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nOMWdAbvrNo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Spells
Currently implemented -> 
- Spark (poison spell) -- Gives poison to nearby entities
- Wave (poison spell) -- Gives poison to nearby entities
- Leap (generic/utility spell) -- Leaps the user up in the air
- Escape (utility/fire spell) -- Leaps the user up in the air and sets the ground on fire
- Fly (generic/utility spell) -- Allows the user to fly until they touch the ground again
- Comet (explosion spell) -- Boom
- Lightning (lightning spell) -- Boom 2
- Rage (effects/lightning spell) -- Applies several effects to the user

### Spells coming soon (Planned)
- Launch
- Chain Bolt
- Mirror
- Mind Trick
- Bloom

Feel free to suggest more in discord!

## Customizable settings
For each spell you can modify the spell name, particle colors, cooldowns, damage, hitranges and more. Spells are defined under a created wand, allowing you to have multiple wands that work differently.

## Documentation & Support
Click [here](https://docs.michielo.com/#/MagicWands/README) for documentation, or click here to find what you need instantly:
- [Commands](https://docs.michielo.com/#/MagicWands/commands)
- [Permissions](https://docs.michielo.com/#/MagicWands/permissions)
- [Configuration](https://docs.michielo.com/#/MagicWands/configuration)

For more support, feel free to join my Discord server by clicking [here](https://discord.gg/XkDPdEfcQJ).
